validation: No new local validation in this fast submission; reused prior complete official local passes.

online_evaluation.verdict: The combined task110/task138/task216 submission regressed substantially online.
online_evaluation.disposition: Reject this combined package and do not merge it into the team-high submission.
online_evaluation.attribution_limit: This three-task combined submission does not identify which individual replacement caused the regression.
online_evaluation.recommended_next_step: Return to the team-high baseline and isolate replacements in separate Kaggle submissions before reuse.

isolation_evaluation.diagnosis: task110 is the confirmed source of the large online regression. task138 and task216 are individually positive on the 7379.41 isolation baseline.
isolation_evaluation.combined_consistency: The isolated rounded deltas sum to -15.48, consistent with the combined submission delta of about -15.47 after leaderboard rounding.
isolation_evaluation.team_high_limit: task138 and task216 have not yet been tested on the unavailable 7383.93 team-high binary.
